title: Bala
subTitle: Bala, a hitman, falls for the daughter of the rival gang's leader, but his love is threatened when the two gangs decide to forge family ties.

title: Thamizhachi
subTitle: After her husband is unjustly imprisoned on false charges, a woman refuses to step out of her house. With the arrival of a female reporter looking for true stories, the truth eventually comes out.

title: Brahmachari
subTitle: Ganesan and Malathi fall in love despite being from different economic backgrounds. However, Malathi's father, Thiruvadi, stands as an obstacle to their marriage.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Hello
subTitle: Chandru's friends make fun of him as he does not have a girlfriend. He points out at a girl claiming that she is his girlfriend, due to which a number of unfortunate events take place in her life.

title: Azhagesan
subTitle: Azhagesan, a man with a mental disability, secretly loves his cousin Nandini. However, when Sekhar, an evil man, rapes Nandini and beats Azhagesan, she ends up killing Sekhar and goes to prison.

title: Sabash
subTitle: Srinivasan, a man who is blind, and his friend Dharan discover the body of Cheenu's wife, Shanti. Initially, the police regard it as a suicide but new evidence suggests foul play.

title: Salangai Oli
subTitle: Balakrishna, a trained Kuchipudi dancer, gets an opportunity to compete in a classical dance festival. However, two days prior to his performance, his mother passes away which leaves him devastated.

title: Kaadhal Sugamanathu
subTitle: A woman loves a man but does not have the courage to confess her feelings. When she asks her younger sister to approach her love interest, her sister ends up betraying her.

title: Sakthivel
subTitle: An honest cop, Sakthivel, clashes with a powerful politician's son. Later, he is promoted and sent to a remote village where he uncovers a deeper corruption that puts his principles to the test.

title: Sakthivel
subTitle: An honest cop, Sakthivel, clashes with a powerful politician's son. Later, he is promoted and sent to a remote village where he uncovers a deeper corruption that puts his principles to the test.

title: Sathyam Sivam Sundaram
subTitle: Vijayalakshmi, a pauper, and her visually impaired brothers struggle to make ends meet. Things change when she discovers her real identity.

title: Chinna Chinna Aasaigal
subTitle: Since Vasu's father is very strict, he yearns to be carefree like his friends. When his father goes on a trip, Vasu breaks all the rules, but ends up getting into more trouble than expected.

title: Thadam
subTitle: While investigating the death of a man, the police track down their lead suspect. However, the case takes a twisted turn when they discover a clone of their suspect.

title: Naai Sekar
subTitle: When his neighbour's experiment goes wrong, Sekar has to bear the consequences as he starts developing the traits and characteristics of a dog.

title: Kidaari
subTitle: Kombaiah Pandian, a village bigwig, falls victim to a brutal stabbing by an enemy. Consequently, his devoted servant Kidari embarks on a mission to unmask the assailant.

title: Zombie
subTitle: Tired of their day-to-day lives, three friends decide to go on a vacation where they encounter zombies and meet a girl while running for their lives.

title: Unakkum Enakkum
subTitle: Kavitha, a villager belle, and Santhosh, the son of a business tycoon, fall in love with each other. Later, Kavitha's brother challenges Santhosh to prove his prowess in farming.

title: Charlie Chaplin
subTitle: Surya and Chandra, two unemployed friends, try to find employment. However, things get complex when Surya new job is protecting a girl from a criminal, and the criminal turns out to be Chandra.

title: Charlie Chaplin
subTitle: Surya and Chandra, two unemployed friends, try to find employment. However, things get complex when Surya new job is protecting a girl from a criminal, and the criminal turns out to be Chandra.

title: Neethikku Thandanai
subTitle: Supporters of the village's panchayat president beat up a few men who stand against their leader. A doctor gets into trouble after he treats the victims' wounds.

title: En Purushan Ethir Veetu Ponnu
subTitle: Pandian lives separated from his wife after misbehaving with his sister-in-law. However, following her sister's death, she reunites with Pandian and suspects him of infidelity.

title: Chinna Mapillai
subTitle: Prabhu, from a poor family, lies to Sukanya about his wealth before their wedding. Her mother, disapproving, plots to destroy their marriage.

title: Mandhira Punnagai
subTitle: A widower along with his daughter decides to kidnap Geeta, who is a young college girl. Complications arise when the three are forcibly held captive by an evil man.

title: Isai Paadum Thendral
subTitle: Mohan's father wants him to marry Menaka but Mohan likes Kalyani. His father soon gives in to his demands but Menaka has other plans.

title: Azhahi
subTitle: Shanmugam, a vet, is happily married to Valarmati and has two children. However, things takea turn, when Shanmugam's childhood love enters his life.

title: Kaaki Sattai
subTitle: Police constable Mathimaran investigates illegal organ donations and tries to put an end to the suffering of innocent people.

title: Pulival
subTitle: Kasi, an employee of a supermarket, steals an expensive phone containing explicit videos belonging to a rich businessman Karthik. Hell breaks loose when the videos get uploaded onto the Internet.
